rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 18, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT ANTHONY BISHOP, STEVE TARPLEY, LENDERS COMMERCIAL FINANCE, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees is continued to October 20, 2020. The Court received a courtesy copy of a reply signed and served on September 11, 2020. No reply appears to have been filed or submitted for filing. By no later that September 21, 2020 moving party to (1) either file the reply accompanied by a declaration explaining the lack of timely filing; or (2) submit a declaration informing the Court and the opposing party that the reply was not intended for filing and consideration by the Court. =(501/CFH)
